title: Kaggle Watchlist
description: Append-only log of Yes/No decisions taken on Kaggle Launch notifications. Both branches of the interactive flow (#28 accept, #46 skip) write here so the /status command (#32) and any future audit can reconstruct the decision history.

competition_id.description: Kaggle competition slug or numeric id used in the URL (e.g. 'titanic')

competition_name.description: Human-readable name parsed from the Launch email

competition_url.description: Canonical kaggle.com URL of the competition

decision.description: User's choice: accept = scaffold a repo and join, decline = mark email read and log

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the decision was recorded

source_email_id.description: Gmail message id that triggered this decision, used to dedupe and to mark-as-read on decline

repo_url.description: Set on accept entries once the GitHub repo has been scaffolded (#28). Absent on decline entries.
